tensions.label: Paper crowded, physical absent
tensions.detail: COT net spec at 161,335 (prev -16,603) while Shanghai trades at $-258/oz COMEX discount — spec momentum driving price, not physical demand. Fragile if specs exit.

tensions.label: Violent COT flip to spec long
tensions.detail: Net spec moved +177,938 contracts in one week (from -16,603 to 161,335). Either the smart money just loaded — or this is a momentum trap at the highs.
